// NOTE: Environment-specific values (gateway URLs, endpoints, keys) do NOT belong in this file.
// NOTE 2: Put them in appsettings.Local.json (gitignored, same folder) or environment variables.
// EnterpriseGenCoreApiKey: leave blank here; supply via env var EnterpriseGenCoreApiKey or appsettings.Local.json
// AzureOpenAIEndpoint: --provider=azure v1 endpoint, e.g. https://<resource>.openai.azure.com/openai/v1; or set env var AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT
// AzureOpenAIApiKey: leave blank to use Entra ID (az login) instead; supply via env var AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY
